Short Description:
Mimo Live Sales is a live commerce software-as-a-service (SaaS) platform based in São Paulo, Brazil, founded in 2020. The company focuses on enabling brands to conduct e-commerce transactions through live video interactions, integrating livestreaming with e-commerce capabilities on websites and applications. Mimo aims to democratize live commerce in the Brazilian market and has expanded its reach across Latin America, serving over 200 brands in six countries, including the USA, Argentina, Peru, Chile, and Colombia.

Mimo offers a range of live commerce solutions, including a core platform for selling products through live interactions, a short video commerce vertical launched in 2024, and a full-service offering that includes pre-live planning, live execution, and post-live analytics. The platform is designed to enhance customer engagement and boost conversion rates, providing brands with the support needed to maximize sales outcomes during live video sessions. Mimo operates with a team of approximately 30-40 employees, co-founded by Ilan Vasserman and Paula Proushan, with Etienne Du Jardin as Co-Founder and Chief Product Officer.

Short Description:
LIVEBUY is a Berlin-based company founded in 2020 that specializes in live video shopping technology for the e-commerce sector. The company offers a platform-as-a-service (PaaS) that integrates interactive, shoppable video content into online stores, enhancing the shopping experience. With a fully remote team of 17 employees across Europe, LIVEBUY has conducted nearly 1,500 livestreams, establishing itself as a leader in video commerce solutions.

The platform features shoppable videos and live streaming, allowing retailers to embed video content directly into their online shops. It includes a dashboard for managing shows and performance analytics, as well as integration tools for easy setup and customization. Advanced features such as AI-powered subtitles, cart remarketing, and social media traffic integration support retailers and brands in boosting engagement and conversions, particularly among Gen Z and Millennials. LIVEBUY serves a diverse clientele, including retailers and content creators, looking to enhance their e-commerce strategies.

Short Description:
Shoppable Product Catalog/Feed Management and Optimization that Boosts Conversions and Increases ROI

Who We Are

We have been at the forefront of shoppable product catalog/feed excellence since the early days of shoppable catalogs, having been on the team at Google that originally developed best practices for shoppable products. We've continued to experiment and develop new best practices for catalog excellence as shoppable has evolved.

Our Approach

At Make It Shoppable, we believe in taking a data-driven approach to shoppable catalog/feed excellence. We use empirical experiments to inform our best practices that lead to better results for our clients.



We optimize your shoppable catalogs and feeds to take advantage of the latest ai driven bidding algorithms such as Performance Max and Advantage+ to increase your ROI.

Our Services

We offer full-service shoppable product catalog/feed management, including our proprietary shoppable product catalog optimization technology. We can export shoppable product catalogs and feeds to any platform including Google, Bing, Meta, Snapchat, TikTok, Connected TV, and Programmatic advertising.

Short Description:
Getting discovered and winning customer trust on social has become incredibly hard.

Influencer marketing was supposed to solve this problem.
Borrow trust, borrow reach, get discovered.

But instead, it created new problems.
– upfront payments with no guaranteed sales
– messy attribution
– inconsistent ROI
– content that looks like ads, not recommendations

So instead of feeling like word of mouth, it feels like another placement.

That's when we asked a very simple question at Linkfluencer - What if UGC wasn't the bet, but the by-product of sales?

What if the people posting weren't hired influencers, but real customers who already bought, loved the product, and were rewarded to talk about it?

That's exactly what Linkfluencer does.

We turn your customers into brand marketers.
– They shop
– Post authentic content
– Get rewarded
– Brands only pay when real sales happen

So instead of gambling on reach, you build a repeatable, performance-led customer content engine.

Made in Live est une innovation technologique unique sur le marché qui permet aux marques, via une plateforme digitale 100% française de Live & Social Shopping, de reprendre le pouvoir de leur influence sur les réseaux sociaux.

Notre solution technologique permet de rendre les vidéos Live ou enregistrées "shoppable" et de proposer aux communautés une expérience d'achat interactive et immersive : navigation dans les fiches produits et sur l'e-shop sans perdre de vue l'animation vidéo du prescripteur /influenceur, jusqu'à la validation du panier final intégrant le code promo.

Ce nouveau canal de vente permet à une marque d'imaginer une expérience qui aide à déclencher l'acte d'achat tout en travaillant :
- son image
- sa notoriété
- sa création de contenu
- son taux d'engagement sur les réseaux sociaux
- sa relation client et sa fidélisation
- son animation commerciale et sa promotion. 

La marque reste propriétaire de ses datas et de ses insights, son parcours client est sécurisé et fluidifié, ainsi nous redonnons aux marques le pouvoir de leur influence.

Un Social / Live shopping ce n'est pas uniquement de la technique c'est aussi et surtout une histoire, une expérience unique qu'une marque propose à ses clients/prospects.
